_installation: Merge the 'rules' array below into your opencode.json at the project
OpenCode permission rules are evaluated pre-tool-call. Each rule has:
- tool:    The tool name to match (e.g. 'bash', 'shell')
- pattern: A regex matched against the tool input
- message: Human-readable explanation shown on deny/ask

rules.message: Recursive forced delete detected. This irreversibly deletes files and is blocked by the block-destructive-bash guardrail.
Force push to git remote detected. This can overwrite remote history irreversibly and is blocked by the block-destructive-bash guardrail.
SQL destructive DDL detected (DROP TABLE / TRUNCATE). This irreversibly destroys data and is blocked by the block-destructive-bash guardrail.
Low-level disk write (dd if=... of=/dev/...) detected. This can irreversibly overwrite disk data and is blocked.
Windows drive format command detected. This irreversibly destroys all data on the drive and is blocked.
